Growth AI · Keywords
High confidenceSearch Console + ordersLast sync: today 06:14
Strike distance
5 keywords one move from top 3
Closing the #4–10 gap is worth +$57K/mo. “standing desk converter” alone is +$14K — same page, five positions up.
Position drop
2 champions slipping — $40K exposed
“best standing desk” fell #2→#3 and “adjustable desk” #2→#4. The revenue follows the position down — defend before it accelerates.
Cannibalization
2 pages competing for one term
Two of your pages both target “standing desk” — they split the clicks and neither reaches top 3. Consolidate to one.
